title: codereview: Transmission channel field added but get_rx_candidates not yet updated to filter by channel
description: After adding channel to Transmission and start_tx, the get_rx_candidates and detect_activity still need channel param and filtering to implement rendezvous (RX only on expected hop channel per SFN/time) and independent per-channel oracle. This is P2 correctness for multi-channel. Tagged codereview. Parent project-LICHEN-64um.
close_reason: Fixed by extending get_rx_candidates and detect_activity with channel filtering for rendezvous and per-channel independence (as part of main 64um updates). 3 clean passes completed.
